15 RDL Empty Bar
15 Bent Over Row Empty Bar

10 Glute Bridge @ 50% DL

strength.name: Deadlift
strength.description:
4x4 | * Shoulders to back pocket
* Crown to Ceiling
* Push the world away | E3MOM 21 mins
BUILD 3 sets

03:00 6 @ 60%
06:00 4 @ 70%
Hold 4 Sets

metcon.name: Nutts
metcon.description:
For Time
10 Handstand Push-Ups
15 Deadlifts (250/175 lb)
25 Box Jumps (30/24 in)
50 Pull-Ups
100 Wall Ball Shots (20/14 lb)
200 Double-Unders
400 meter Run (with 45/35 lb plate)

hypertrophy.reasoning: Posterior chain and lower body exhausted; upper push/pull accessory work builds balanced hypertrophy without CNS interference.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 4 at 80 percent. Metcon: Nutts. For Time: 10 Handstand Push-Ups, 15 Deadlifts (250/175 lb), 25 Box Jumps (30/24 in), 50 Pull-Ups, 100 Wall Ball Shots (20/14 lb). For hypertrophy, focus on chest, shoulders (rear delt), triceps.
